tool.name: map_to_compliance
tool.description:
Map a vulnerability to OWASP Top 10 2021 / CWE / MITRE ATT&CK / PCI-DSS / SOC2 / HIPAA / GDPR tags.
Pass cwe (canonical like 'CWE-89') OR vuln_type (free-form keyword: sqli, xss, ssrf, idor, jwt, rce, etc). Call before create_vulnerability_report to attach full compliance metadata.
Returns owasp_top10_2021 category, MITRE technique IDs, compliance_tags (PCI-DSS-6.5.1, HIPAA-164.308(a)(4), SOC2-CC6.1, GDPR-Art.32, ...).
